message:
fix(html-export): Parse Cursor tool call format for collapsible rendering

The extract_tool_call() function only handled Claude/Anthropic format tool calls
(content array with type: "tool_use" blocks). This missed Cursor's format which
uses type: "tool" at the top level with message.tool_name/tool_input/tool_output.

Added support for Format 2 (Cursor/generic) alongside existing Format 1, enabling
tool calls from Cursor sessions to render as collapsible <details> elements.

Fixes 3 previously skipped E2E tests in collapsible.spec.ts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
